action_set_definitions.name: get_prescription_info
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the core details of a prescription including patient ID, medication, dosage, and current workflow status.

prescription_id.description: The unique identifier of the prescription (e.g., RX-7721).

action_set_definitions.name: get_patient_data
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves comprehensive patient profile information including allergies and home address for geographical verification.

patient_id.description: The unique identifier of the patient.

action_set_definitions.name: query_pdmp_records
action_set_definitions.description: Accesses the Prescription Drug Monitoring Program database to retrieve a history of controlled substance fills for a patient.

patient_id.description: The unique identifier of the patient.

action_set_definitions.name: submit_final_decision
action_set_definitions.description: Records the final dispensing decision (APPROVED or REFUSED) in the system along with the clinical rationale.

prescription_id.description: The unique identifier of the prescription.

decision.description: The final state of the verification.

rationale.description: A detailed explanation of why the prescription was approved or refused, citing MME or red flags.

state_description.active_prescription_id: The unique identifier of the prescription currently being processed.
state_description.verification_workflow_step: Current stage of the verification (e.g., PENDING_ID, CLINICAL_REVIEW, FINAL_CHECK).
state_description.inventory_records: A mapping of medication IDs to their current stock levels and expiration dates.
state_description.patient_profiles: Database of patient information including allergy history and past prescriptions.
state_description.session_logs: History of actions taken in the current session for audit trails.

prescription_details.directions: 1 tablet PO every 6 hours as needed for pain
prescription_details.prescriber_address: 892 Medical Plaza, Remote Heights (Zip: 55890, 72 miles away)
